zone.name: Profile Town
zone.objective: Recover archive shards, explore the workshop route, and speak to the town archivists.

subAreas.name: Profile Square
subAreas.description: Central town area where the archive recovery starts.

subAreas.name: Workshop Route
subAreas.description: A builder-focused lane that unlocks automation and project systems.

npcs.name: Guide Byte
npcs.dialogue: Welcome to Profile Town. The archive fractured into memory shards. Recover them and the resume journal will rebuild itself. Start by finding the Profile Shard near the water edge.

npcs.name: Workshop Scout
npcs.dialogue: The workshop route is where systems get built. Recover the Builder Shard, inspect the workshop terminal, and you’ll restore the automation/product systems layer of the resume.

npcs.name: Field Mentor
npcs.dialogue: Practical capability matters. Real work happens where plans meet constraints, tools, and pressure. I’ve restored the Electrical & Field Experience entry.

npcs.name: Archive Keeper
npcs.dialogue: A resume is more than a list. It’s a map of how someone thinks, builds, and delivers. I’ve restored the Operations, Leadership & Delivery entry.

npcs.name: Workshop Terminal
npcs.dialogue: Builder systems restored. This terminal marks the product/workflow lane of the portfolio. Future project quests will branch from here.

clues.label: Profile Shard
clues.message: You recovered the Profile Summary shard.

clues.label: Builder Shard
clues.message: You recovered the Builder Shard. Bring it to the Workshop Terminal to stabilize the systems archive.
